away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Emma Cechova
players.injury_comment: Cechova suffered a non-contact injury during Thursday's 90-86 win over Dallas and required assistance off the floor. After undergoing an MRI, she was diagnosed with a torn ACL, ending her season. The 21-year-old rookie appeared in three games, and she will finish the 2026 campaign by averaging 8.3 points, 3.7 rebounds, 0.3 steals and 0.7 blocks across 17.3 minutes. With Cechova sidelined, Anastasiia Kosu could be first in line to see more action.

players.name: Napheesa Collier
players.injury_comment: Head coach Cheryl Reeve said Wednesday that Collier is "doing basketball things" but isn't yet cleared for team-related activities. The superstar forward underwent surgery on her left ankle March 24 and was expected to return to on-court activities in early June, but she remains without a concrete timeline for her season debut.

players.name: Dorka Juhasz
players.injury_comment: Juhasz is dealing with a right mid-foot sprain, per Borzi, and will miss at least the next five games, including Thursday's clash against Toronto. A more exact timeline for her return should come into focus as she begins to clear hurdles in her rehab.

players.name: Dana Evans
players.injury_comment: Evans remains without a clear timetable for a return and has yet to make her season debut due to a left leg injury. She can be considered week-to-week until the Aces offer an update on her progress.
